Seller

Pro

✦ E-COMMERCE TOOLKIT
Shipping labels, courier sorting, cancel tracking, RTO management, SKU reports — sab kuch ek jagah, seconds mein.
FEATURED TOOLS
Label Processor
Sort & Cropped Labels. Multi-PDF channel sorting for bulk dispatch.
Stock Picker
Optimized Packing Lists. Calculate expected items for efficient picking.
In/Out
Stock Ledger. Manage rework, purchases, and outward returns easily.
Notes & Stats
Workspace Tools. Keep daily context, notes, and performance stats.
Reports
Sales Analytics. View SKU sales, platform breakdown, and channel performance.
Live Stock
Real-Time Stock. Monitor inventory levels, low-stock alerts, and mapping rules.
Scanners
RTO & Cancel Track. Bulk scan Packet IDs, returns, and canceled orders instantly.
Data Manager
Configure Mappings. Centralized SKU mapping and configuration rules.
E-Commerce Toolkit | Centralized Operations Dashboard

Data Manager

☁️
Cloud Data
Date ya search fill karo → button dabao
ℹ️ AWB Cache = fast lookup table. Count Orders se alag ho sakta hai — dono normal hai.
🗑️ Delete by Date (category → date range)
🔄 Full Reset (SKU + Names + Stock)
SKU Mapped + Product Names + Stock — teeno ek saath delete honge. Orders/Cancels/Returns safe rahenge.
🗄️
Local Cache (IndexedDB)
Device pe stored temporary data
📋
Product Names
Ek per line names daalo → Save → Label Processor mein SKU ke aage dropdown mein milenge
🏷️
Mapped SKUs
Loading...
💡 Tap/Long press karo SKU chip pe select karne ke liye
⚠️
🔐

💡 Dono khali = saara data delete hoga
⚠️ Ye action permanently delete karega — undo nahi hoga. Supabase se data hata jaayega.

Live Stock

📦 Roz Dashboard Sheet upload karo — uss din ka Net (Dispatch), Rework aur Purchase us din ke column me save ho jayega. Live Stock = Opening + Rework + Purchase − Dispatch (poore mahine ka). Ab "✍️ Manual Entry" se bhi kisi bhi din/product ki Purchase/Rework/Return/Dispatch entry seedhe daal sakte ho, aur Opening Stock column ab hamesha edit ho sakta hai (⬅️ "Last Month Stock Lao" button se pichle month ka closing wapas la sakte ho).

SKU Delete Karo?
Yeh mapping permanently remove ho jaayegi.

Courier Aa Gaya?
Yeh order cancel list se delete hoga aur Orders (Shipped) mein add ho jayega
AWB — Product — Courier — Cancel Date —
ℹ️ Cancel entry delete ho jayegi. Aaj ki date pe Orders (Shipped) mein add ho jayega — Data Manager mein dikhai dega.
